A '''Gravity Well''' was an Expert level [[Bank (swoopchasing)|Bank]] fence used in [[swoopchasing]]. Riders jumped a ditch with [[Repulsor field/Legends|repulsor field]] generators at the bottom, which worked to draw the rider and their [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] towards the bottom of the pit. Riders who were unable to clear the jump fell into a pit usually filled with the debris of previous racers who did not make it. Rescue crews considered attending crashes on this obstacle to be a waste of time.<ref name="BSS" />
